rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JOHN SOLLNER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 1. Petitioners' Motion for Attorneys' Fees. GRANTED. Attorneys fees granted in the amount of $10,840.00. Petitioners are the prevailing party having recovered greater relief in the instant action. (Civ. Code, § 1717.) Defendants failed to show existence of an agreement waiving attorneys' fees. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Doris Wongs Notice Of Motion Motion For An Order Barring Plaintiff From Offering Any Documents At Trial Other Than Documents Previously Produced Because Of His Disobedience Of Court Order; Request For Sanctions.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 2. Defendant Doris Wongs Motion For An Order Barring Plaintiff From Offering Any Documents At Trial Other Than Documents Previously Produced Because Of His Disobedience Of Court Order; Request For Sanctions. -CONTINUED to May 13, 2015. Moving party failed to provide the Court with courtesy copies of the motion. (See SF Local Rule 2.6B.) Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Dept. 501 by 4 p.m. on April 28, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES M MEYERING et al VS. ALFONSO FAUSTINO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Amend Answer And Join Cross Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 3. DEFENDANTS IRENE FAUSTINO, JULIE FAUSTINO, and ALFONSO FAUSTINO, JR.'s Motion To Amend Answer And Join Cross Defendants. HEARING REQUIRED =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel The Deposition Of Third Party Witness Salomon Herrera; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Salomon Herrera.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 4. PLAINTIFF APRIL CAMPBELL, PAULA BUCKLEY, JOHN ADAMS, JOSEPH CATONE, BELINDA CAMPOS' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Third Party Witness Salomon Herrera; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Salomon Herrera. GRANTED. Request for Sanctions is DENIED since monetary sanctions are not available against a third party witness and Herrera has not unsuccessfully opposed the instant motion. (CCP §§ 2023.030(e), 2025.480(j).)=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: D. P. OCHOA VS. CITY HOUSING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 5. DEFENDANT CITY HOUSING, INC's.and TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to May 14, 2015. Moving party failed to provide the Court with a complete courtesy copy of the operative complaint. (See SF Local Rule 2.6C.) Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Dept. 501 by 4 p.m. on May 1, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSI VS. ONYINYECHUKWU UDEH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgmnt For Breach Of Terms; Notice
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 6. PLAINTIFF BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY (Amended) Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment For Breach Of Terms; GRANTED. Plaintiff made a sufficient showing pursuant to CCP 664.6 that Defendants violated the terms of the stipulation. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 7. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA TIRADO and ALEXANDRE DE BARROS Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. JAMES GARMON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 8. DEFENDANT JAMES GARMON's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment GRANTED Subject to opposition. Defendant's motion provides a sufficient showing that his lack of action in the matter was a result of mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. (C.C.P. § 473(b).) =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL MECHETTI VS. FLORA KORVER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday, April 21, 2015. Line 9. DEFENDANT FLORA BUCKLEY's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. Subject to opposition. Defendant's motion provides a sufficient showing that her lack of action in the matter was a result of mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. (C.C.P. § 473(b).)=(501/REQ)
